title: call_batch doc cites RFC 8620 §3.3 for response-side duplicate call-id check
description: client.rs call_batch doc says 'Returns ClientError::Parse if the server returns duplicate call ids, which violates RFC 8620 §3.3 ("each method call id MUST be unique within a request").' The check is on the server response, not the client request. RFC 8620 §3.3 governs client-side call id uniqueness in the request; §3.4 describes the methodResponses array structure where duplicate call ids from the server would be anomalous. The parenthetical quote is from §3.3 (correct), but citing it to justify a server-response check misleads contributors about which section of the spec covers response-side behavior. Future contributors debugging the error path will look in the wrong section of the RFC.
close_reason: Fixed: Patch<T> doc updated to cover both patterns; RFC citation corrected to §3.4; tests added for duplicate call_id and duplicate accountId
